docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KEN ALAN LAMANCE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-05-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-22-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT STAVROS, ANDREW W SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED MAR-13-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT STAVROS, ANDREW W

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-04-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
